response.justification: Bogdan is a genuinely strong senior engineer with nearly two decades of polyglot experience, deep open-source commitment (founder of GISCollective, D-language libraries, FOSS4G speaker), and solid Linux credentials that align well with the company's digital-sovereignty focus. However, this is an executive leadership role requiring minimum C1 German, and his resume lists German as 'Basic' — a hard blocker for a client-facing consulting lead in Germany. His career is also almost entirely individual-contributor track: there is no evidence of formal team leadership, technical project management of client engagements, UML-based modeling, or IT security/compliance advisory work, all of which are core to this position.
strengths: Extensive open-source track record and Linux background, closely matching the company's digital-sovereignty specialization
Broad, senior-level engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Demonstrated mentorship inclination through workshops, courses, and community talks
concerns: German listed as 'Basic' versus the required C1 minimum for a client-facing leadership role
No formal experience leading teams or managing client projects at Head-of-Development level
No evidence of UML expertise, IT security/risk/compliance advisory, or Python proficiency
